hero.headline: We build solutions driven by what comes next.
hero.subhead: Established to steer customers through the next generation of software, business, and security innovation — bridging the gap between business and technology, not standing between them.

narrative.title: A B2B technology consultancy with delivery in five countries.
paragraphs: Vergent Technology Solutions Ltd. helps clients leverage new technologies to competitive advantage and supports them through software development, cloud transformation, and security work.

Our capabilities are uniquely distinguished by where we deliver from. With teams across Kenya, Kyrgyzstan, the Philippines, and India, we run continuous engagements with senior people in your time zone — not handoff queues across vendors.
Most of our work is repeat business. Almost all of it ships to production.

expertise.title: Comprehensive expertise across the platforms enterprises rely on.

items.title: Microsoft cloud and Dynamics
items.body: Azure landing zones, Office 365 governance, and Dynamics 365 implementations that align to how your business actually runs.

items.title: Oracle license rationalization
items.body: Strategic license management for Oracle environments — fewer surprises at audit time, lower spend the rest of the year.

items.title: SAP modernization
items.body: Transition to SAP S/4HANA cloud solutions with a delivery plan that respects the integrations holding your operations together.

items.title: AWS optimization
items.body: Tailor AWS usage for performance and cost efficiency. Reserved instances, right-sizing, and the unglamorous bits that move the bill.

items.title: Software licensing assessment
items.body: Maximize the value of your software licenses while ensuring compliance — across Microsoft, Oracle, SAP, and the long tail.

approach.title: Embedded delivery, accountable to outcomes.
bullets: Aligning security models with SABSA, ITIL, and COBIT
